---
id: create-application-context
title: "Create application context"
description: "Create or update application context. Creates a new immutable version and deactivates the previous one. Takes effect immediately."
sidebar_label: "Create application context"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api-reference/generated/memintel-app-developer-api

<MethodEndpoint
  method=&#123;"post"&#125;
  path=&#123;"/context"&#125;
  context=&#123;"endpoint"&#125;
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Create or update application context. Creates a new immutable version and deactivates the previous one. Takes effect immediately.
